thesis_profile.market_mechanism: in the liquid perp-covered core, the v71 CoinGlass extended composite (+taker - retail_long - liq_imbalance - top_trader_long) works in dispersed-up regimes where extreme positioning fades, but flips sign in broad-down and drawdown-rebound regimes where positioning extremes signal capitulation pre-bounce; v72 introduces a per-timestamp regime-conditional sign multiplier on the 3 positioning sub-features driven by the cross-sectional median momentum sign, leaving the taker-imbalance term sign-invariant
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank liquid perp-covered names by blending the v64 dual-regime signal with a regime-conditional CoinGlass composite where the 3 positioning sub-features (retail_long, liq_imbalance, top_trader_long) use fade-extremity signs in positive-median-momentum regimes and align-with-positioning signs in negative-median-momentum regimes, weighted at 12% on the final signal stage
thesis_profile.factor_formula: v64 raw_score and stable_rank_score remain unchanged; final blended_signal = 0.88 * v64_blended + 0.12 * xs_zscore(coinglass_composite_v7), where coinglass_composite_v7 = (1/4) * [z_taker + sign_flip * (-z_retail_long - z_liq_imbalance - z_top_trader_long)] and sign_flip = 1 - 2 * med_neg with med_neg = clip(-cross_sectional_median(momentum_20)/0.06, 0, 1); when median momentum is positive (sign_flip=+1) the composite reproduces v71 fade-extremity behavior, when median is negative (sign_flip=-1) the 3 positioning sub-features flip to align with positioning
